chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي فِي الثَّوْبِ وَ هُوَ غَيْرُ طَاهِرٍ عَالِماً أَوْ جَاهِلًا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 61 – The man prays Salāt in the clothes and they are without cleanliness, knowingly or unknowingly

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/327)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/327)
text: اغْسِلْ ثَوْبَكَ مِنْ بَوْلِ كُلِّ مَا لَا يُؤْكَلُ لَحْمُهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Wash your clothes from urine of everything the flesh of which cannot be eaten’.
en.sarwar: 12. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Wash your clothes clean because of urine of all inedible animals.’”
